_comment: PR #164 native-proxy manifest, SELF-CONTAINED. server .log files under research/ are gitignored (research/**/*.log), so the measured sglang vllm-chat scored per-position ladders are embedded here directly (conditional_p_sglang + num_drafts) for zero-GPU reproducibility -- same convention as #156 banking parsed ladders into results.json. Each proxy is count-pooled (mode=pooled): its distinct hard component is cumulative-blended with the shared public reference at the continuous weight that lands the DECODE-frame linear drop on GT-4.3% (<=0.5pp gate). Independence comes from the three distinct components (domain-code / register-casual-short / generic-hard-chat-tail), not from re-weighting one tail. Raw server logs live (gitignore-excluded) under research/validity/private_gap_probe/native_{code,casual}/ and research/validity/tree_private_drop_reconcile/sglang_ladder_run/; per-run tps/ppl/E_accept summaries are committed under ./native_ladders/.

component._src: research/validity/private_gap_probe/native_casual/server_private_rerun.log (fresh, code-excluded short-turn casual ShareGPT, 0.6x public length)

research/validity/tree_private_drop_reconcile/sglang_ladder_run/server_private_rerun.log (banked #156 deliberately-hard chat tail; here count-pooled, NOT conditional-interpolated -- isolates pooling vs #156's interpolation on the identical component)
